channel.title: Transmedia on Jean-Christophe Ploquin & Arthur Gyl: two faces of an artist
channel.description: Recent content in Transmedia on Jean-Christophe Ploquin & Arthur Gyl: two faces of an artist

item.title: Creating an Acousmatic Game: Behind the Scenes of Fluctus Planetarium
item.description: Creating an Acousmatic Game: Behind the Scenes of Fluctus Planetarium How to transform a contemporary multimedia art installation into an interactive gaming experience? A look back at the genesis of a singular transmedia project, where gravitational physics and electroacoustic composition converge toward a new form of collaborative creation. From a Multimedia Installation to an Interactive Game Fluctus Planetarium was born in 2023 from an artistic collaboration between Louis Jeanne and myself.

item.title: Breaking Language Barriers: How My French SF Trilogy Found Its English Voice
item.description: Breaking Language Barriers: How My French SF Trilogy Found Its English Voice As an acousmatic music composer, I’ve always been fascinated by transformation—how sound can evolve, morph, and transcend its original form. This same fascination with metamorphosis led me to explore a profound question in science fiction: what happens when humanity itself undergoes transformation? Today, I’m thrilled to announce that my French science fiction trilogy ‘De la Mort à la Vie’ is now available worldwide in English as ‘From Death to Life.
